title: Dusk
description: A Fabric mod that makes darkness feel like it should.
body:
Something is different about the world.

You cannot quite say what it is. The night feels longer. The silence is heavier than usual. You light a torch, and somehow it does not help.

Dusk is a Fabric mod that introduces real psychological phenomena into Minecraft gameplay. No jump scares. No monsters added. Nothing will tell you what is happening — you will have to figure it out yourself.

When it ends, everything returns to normal. Like nothing happened.

---

## Requirements

| Version | Minecraft | Fabric Loader | Fabric API | Java |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1.21.1 | 1.21.1 | ≥ 0.15.0 | 0.116.x | 21 |
| 1.21.10 | 1.21.10 | ≥ 0.17.2 | 0.138.x | 21 |
| 1.21.11 | 1.21.11 | ≥ 0.18.1 | 0.141.x | 21 |

**Fabric API is required.**
